articles.title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope
articles.description: Can Sam Altman—or any CEO—be trusted with super intelligence?
articles.summary: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI has put its safety record in the spotlight as concerns about AI risk grow.
points: Elon Musk filed a legal complaint alleging that Safety Gating, an independent organization he founded to assess risks of emerging technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), was unfairly excluded from OpenAI's safety protocol review process.
Musk argues this omission led to the unrestrained release and rapid advancement of Microsoft-owned ChatGPT, which has sparked significant debate about AI risks worldwide.

The legal action highlights a growing concern among industry experts that some tech leaders might prioritize speed or corporate interests over thorough safety assessments in the era of superintelligent machines.
articles.insight: Musk's lawsuit and Safety Gating could lead to increased scrutiny within the AI field, encouraging more rigorous risk evaluations before release. It may also prompt tech companies like Microsoft to reconsider their approach towards safety in developing superintelligent systems.

articles.title: Bumble is getting rid of the swipe, CEO says
articles.description: "We are going to be saying goodbye to the swipe," CEO Whitney Wolfe Herd said.
articles.summary: Bumble has announced it will remove the traditional 'swipe' gesture from its app due to feedback that men find preferable for initiating conversations on dating platforms.
points: CEO Whitney Wolfe Herd announces Bumble is eliminating swiping
Men report preference over women with this method at a male-only platform
Bumble to test men's preferred approach of messaging without gender bias
articles.insight: The removal of the 'swipe' feature by Bumble could signal an industry shift towards more inclusive dating practices within technology platforms, potentially influencing other companies to rethink their app design.

articles.title: Tome, another Goodreads book-tracker rival, shuts down
articles.description: Built on the back of the sizable and influential BookTok community -- creators who discuss and review books on TikTok -- the app offered readers a place to chronicle and rate their books, get recommendations, and even add photos of things like favorite quotes or memes, or share playlists that match the book's vibes.
articles.summary: Built on the back of the sizable and influential BookTok community -- creators who discuss and review books on TikTok -- the app offered readers a place to chronicle and rate their books, get recommendations, and even add photos of things like favorite quotes or memes, or share playlists that match the book's vibes
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Could Lovable’s automatic 10% pay raise be the cure for toxic cultures?
articles.description: Stockholm-based vibe-coding platform Lovable is offering employees an automatic 10% raise as a way to sidestep classic corporate politics.
articles.summary: Lovable, the Stockholm-based startup focused on creating positive work environments through 'vibe coding', has decided to provide its employees with an automatic 1 end of year pay raise as a method to avoid negative corporate politics and foster better working relationships.
points: The Lovable company's unique approach involves automating the annual salary increase process, eliminating traditional hierarchical influences on compensation decisions within an organization. This new policy is rooted in their distinctive organizational culture that emphasizes positivity and collective responsibility.

CEO Daniel Carlsson views this pay rise as a tool to dismantle long-standing workplace politics, which he believes can damage professional relationships and employee wellbeing. By implementing an automatic 10% raise for all employees annually without managerial approval or competition among staff members.

This move by Lovable has been recognized as a potentially transformative policy within corporate culture circles; it not only directly improves financial conditions but also contributes to creating healthier, more supportive work environments.
articles.insight: Lovable's approach could set a new standard for how businesses address internal politics and promote positive organizational cultures within the IT/technology industry. As companies become increasingly aware of these issues impacting employee morale, Lovable’s model offers an innovative way to mitigate such problems.

articles.title: Hackers hack victims hacked by other hackers
articles.description: An unknown group of hackers is breaking into systems previously breached by the cybercrime group TeamPCP. Once inside, the hackers immediately kick out TeamPCP and remove its hacking tools from the victims’ systems.
articles.summary: A new hacker collective is targeting previously compromised systems belonging to cybercrime group TeamPCP.
points: Unknown hackers are taking over breached systems of the known criminal organization, TeamPCP.
The intruders swiftly remove all traces and tools left by their predecessors upon gaining access. This includes backdoors for future infiltrations or data exfiltration purposes.
TeamPCP’CTF is an initiative that facilitates the ethical hacking of TeamPCP's systems to strengthen cybersecurity, with no evidence indicating this specific incident has ties to such a contest.
articles.insight: This development reveals evolving tactics in cybercrime where initial intruders are quickly replaced and their footprint eradicated. It underscores the importance of comprehensive security audits, continuous monitoring for suspicious activities after known threats have been identified.

articles.title: Kalshi doubles valuation in 5 months, hitting $22B
articles.description: Prediction market startup Kalshi has raised a $1 billion Series F round led by Coatue.
articles.summary: In just five months since its last funding in December, prediction market startup Kalshi managed to double its valuation with the help of a $1 billion Series F round led by Coatue.
points: Prediction market startup Kalshi has raised a $1 billion Series F round
The investment is being led by renowned venture capital firm Coatue
Kalshi doubled its valuation in just five months
articles.insight: This rapid growth and substantial funding demonstrate the increasing interest and potential for prediction markets within the IT/technology industry. Kalshi' extrinsic success may influence other startups to explore innovative market-based solutions.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos rep leaves Slate Auto’s board
articles.description: Melinda Lewison's departure raises questions about Bezos' support and involvement with the startup at a time when the Amazon founder is now apparently focused on robotics at his new startup, Project Prometheus.
articles.summary: Jeff Bezos has left Slate Auto's board amid speculation that he is directing more attention to a new automotin-focused robotics startup called Project Prometheus.
points: Melinda Lewison departs from the board, raising questions about Jeff Bezos’ involvement with Slate Auto and his support for its mission amidst rumors of focus on a different venture
Slate Auto is an electric vehicle startup that has already received significant investment backing from industry veterans.
Amazon founder's alleged new interest in robotics through Project Prometheus could indicate potential shifts or expansions within the automotive and technology industries
articles.insight: The Jeff Bezos news might signal a shift in focus for innovations at scale, potentially influencing investments across both electric vehicles (EVs) and robotics sectors.

articles.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos has rewritten Firefox’s approach to cybersecurity
articles.description: Security researchers at Mozilla say Anthropic's Mythos has unearthed a wealth of high-severity bugs in Firefox.
articles.summary: Mozilla security researchers have discovered numerous severe vulnerabilities in Firefox through Anthropic's Mythos system that has changed the approach to cybersecurity within Mozilla.
points: Anthropic's AI, known as 'Mythos', used by Mozilla uncovered a multitude of high-severity bugs in Firefox
The vulnerabilities were not identified using conventional methods like fuzzing and symbolic execution
This discovery has led to an overhaul in how cybersecurity threats are assessed within the organization
articles.insight: Anthropic's AI-driven approach signifies a transformative shift for Mozilla, where they now prioritize innovative methods like Mythos system to enhance their traditional security testing and bug bounty programs. This can potentially set new standards in the cybersecurity industry.

articles.title: Google’s $9.99-per-month AI health coach launches May 19
articles.description: The Gemini-powered health coach will act as a combination fitness coach, sleep expert, and health and wellness advisor.
articles.summary: Google is launching an AI health coaching platform called Gemini for $9.99 per month starting May 19. This virtual coach will offer fitness guidance, sleep expertise, and general well-betable advice.
points: Google's new AI service named 'Gemini' is a multi-functional health coaching tool launched for $9.99/month starting May 19th.

The platform will act as both a fitness coach and sleep expert, providing personalized advice on workouts, rest schedules, nutrition guidelines, meditation practices (if applicable), stress management techniques, hydration habits, supplement intake recommendations if relevant, etc., based on the user's data.
Gemini will offer users 24/7 access to their coach and enable them to communicate with an AI assistant that can also understand natural language.
articles.insight: The launch of Google's $9.99-per-month health coaching platform, Gemini, represents a significant expansion for the company in offering personalized wellness advice through artificial intelligence and is likely to increase competition among AI fitness platforms as they attempt to provide more comprehensive services.

articles.title: Google unveils Whoop-like screenless Fitbit Air
articles.description: The device comes with health and fitness tracking like 24/7 heart rate, heart rhythm monitoring with A-fib alerts, SpO2, resting heart rate, heart rate variability, sleep stages and duration, and more.
articles.summary: The device comes with health and fitness tracking like 24/7 heart rate, heart rhythm monitoring with A-fib alerts, SpO2, resting heart rate, heart rate variability, sleep stages and duration, and more

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27: A shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
articles.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications are open, but only for three more weeks. Apply by May 27 for your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, $100,000 equity-free, and more opportunities for major scaling impact.
articles.summary: Startup Battlefield 200 provides a platform where startups can compete in various categories to gain access to funding from venture capitalists (VCs), global visibility through media coverage and networking opportunities.
points: Applications are open until May 27, providing an opportunity for significant startup impact within this period
Participation offers chances of VC access without equity dilution
$100,000 in funding and more opportunities available
articles.insight: This competition can serve as a catalyst for startups to accelerate their growth by providing financial support, networking connections with potential investors, media exposure, and increased visibility.

articles.title: Exhibit at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Get in front of 10,000 decision-makers before space runs out
articles.description: If startup visibility, traction, and real deals matter, you should be on the TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 exhibit floor. Get your 6' exhibit table before your competitor does.
articles.summary: Tech startups are encouraged to showcase their innovation and business potential at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 by securing a table on the crowded exhibit floor.
points: Startup visibility is crucial for success, as noted in an article discussing its importance ahead of TechCrunch Disrupt 2026.
The event promises to bring together over ten thousand decision-makers ready to discover and invest in promising tech startups.
Securing a spot on the exhibit floor is essential for startup competitors aiming to impress potential customers, partners, or funders.
articles.insight: TechCrunch Disrupt serves as an influential platform where early-stage companies can secure vital attention and investment opportunities that may propel them ahead in the tech industry. The competition for prime exhibit spaces at such events reflects the high stakes involved, signaling to startups that effective networking strategies are critical components of their business development.

articles.title: India’s first space tech unicorn emerges as Skyroot gears up for orbital launch
articles.description: Skyroot's valuation has more than doubled since 2023 as the Indian rocket startup prepares for the country's first private orbital launch.
articles.summary: India's space technology company Skyroot has rapidly grown to become a unicorn with its valuation more than doubling since 2023 as it prepares for the country's first private orbital launch.
points: Skyroot, an Indian rocket startup founded in April 2019, has emerged as India’s first space technology unicorn.

The company specializes in designing and manufacturing advanced rockets for commercial satellites to be launched into Earth's orbit or beyond. They have also been working on developing reusable launch systems aimed at reducing the cost of access to outer space, which is a key requirement for future economies such as Mars colonization.
With its valuation having more than doubled since 2023 and setting ambitious targets in rocket design, Skyroot gears up for India's first private orbital launch.
articles.insight: Skyroot’s success highlights the potential of privatized space technology companies to contribute significantly to commercial satellite deployments. Additionally, their focus on reusable rockets and reducing costs can disrupt traditional aerospace manufacturing industries by offering more affordable options.

articles.title: 2 days left: Get 50% off a second pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
articles.description: Two days left to save up to $410 on your pass, and get a second one at 50% off to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Offer ends May 8, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now.
articles.summary: The article announces a limited-time offer for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 event tickets with significant savings available on both first and second passes.
points: TechCrunch is offering up to $410 off each pass, valid until May 8 at midnight PT
The offer includes a deal for two passes: original price of $952 plus tax ($63), with the second discounted by half after applying an additional coupon worth approximately $7
articles.insight: This aggressive pricing strategy could draw in more attendees to TechCrunch Disrupt, potentially increasing networking opportunities and exposure for startups.

articles.title: China’s Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open-source AI skyrockets
articles.description: Moonshot's annualized recurring revenue topped $200 million in April, driven by rapid growth in paid subscriptions and API usage.
articles.summary: China’s AI startup Moonshot has secured a massive $2 billion funding round at an impressive $20 billion valuation amidst skyrocketing demand for open-source artificial intelligence.
points: China's AI company, Moonshot, raised $2 billion in seed financing led by Chinese tech giant Tencent and US investment firm Sequoia Capital.

Moonshot is a platform offering access to open-source models that power natural language processing applications such as text classification or machine translation. The service supports the creation of custom AI tools without coding knowledge, using simple interfaces for model training on cloud servers like Google Cloud and Amazon Web Services (AWS).
With an annualized recurring revenue surpassing $200 million in April alone due to a rapid increase in paid subscriptions and API usage.
articles.insight: The success of Moonshot's fundraising round demonstrates the significant potential for growth within China’th AI sector. As more startups like this seek capital, it suggests that open-source AI is playing a crucial role in democratizing access to advanced technology.

articles.title: Spotify wants to become the home for AI-generated personal audio
articles.description: Users will be able to create a podcast from Codex or Claude Code and import it to Spotify
articles.summary: Spotify is enhancing its platform by integrating AI-generated content for personalized audio experiences.
points: Users can generate a podcast using Spotify'simate codex or Claude, and import it to the service.
This initiative comes with concerns about copyright infringement on music being used as backing tracks for AI-generated audio content.
The move by Spotify demonstrates an increasing role of artificial intelligence within streaming platforms.
articles.insight: As the integration of AI and personalized experiences become more prevalent in technology, concerns over copyright rights will also need to be addressed for a sustainable model.

articles.title: Spotify’s AI DJ now supports French, German, Italian and Brazilian Portuguese
articles.description: Spotify's AI DJ feature now supports French, German, Italian, and Brazilian Portuguese.
articles.summary: The Spotify AI DJ can create personalized music mixes in multiple languages including French, German, Italian, and Brazilian Portuguese.
points: - The Spotify AI DJ supports four additional language options: French, German, Italian, and Brazilian Portuguese.
- Users have the ability to set their desired tempo or BPM (beats per minute) for music mixes created by the AI.
- The new update includes a variety of songs from different artists in multiple languages as part of its database.
articles.insight: This expansion makes Spotify's AI DJ more accessible to non-English speaking users, promoting music enjoyment and discovery across diverse cultures. This could lead to increased engagement within the platform overall.

articles.title: 美 CISA, 기반 시설 공급망에 ‘회복력’ 촉구... 방어보다 ‘운영 연속성’
articles.description: 대만 침공 등 유사시 겨냥한 적대국의 사보타주 대비해 OT 네트워크 고립 전략 권고공격 피해 격리 실패 시 즉각적인 수동 운영 전환 등 강력한 서비스 복원력 훈련 강조[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 미국 사이버보안및인프라보안국(CISA)은 국가 기반 시설 운영자들이 대규모 사이버 공격을 받았을 때에도 필수 서비스를 유지할 수 있도록 시스템을 요새화할 것을 촉구하는
articles.summary: 미국 CISA는 국가 기반시스템을 유지하며,이를 '회복력'으로 강조한다.
points: CISA은 대규모 공격에도 서비스를 보호함
시스템의 운영 연속성을 강조
회복력과 운영 연속성이 인터넷네트워크 보호에서 중요한 요소
articles.insight: CISA는 국가 시스템의 보호와 서비스 복구의 결정성을 강조하고 있습니다.

articles.title: 집 안으로 들어온 AI, 미국은 ‘오케스트레이터’ 중국은 ‘생활형 비서’
articles.description: 미국 스마트홈 시장은 ‘매터’(Matter) 기반 연결성과 플랫폼 생태계 중심으로 성장중국은 AI 가전 앞세워 생활 편의와 자동 수행 기능 중심 스마트홈 경쟁 전개글로벌 스마트홈 시장, AI 기반 생활형 플랫폼으로 빠르게 진화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 불과 몇 년 전만 해도 스마트홈은 음성 명령으로 조명이나 가전을 켜고 끄는 수준에 머물렀다. 하지만 최근에는

IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드

articles.title: 동형암호 기반 데이터 분석을 SaaS로... 디사일로 데이터 클린룸, CSAP 획득
articles.description: 공공기관 대상 공급 기반 마련...B2G 시장 확대 가속화[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 프라이버시 강화 기술(PET) 딥테크 기업 디사일로(대표 이승명)는 동형암호 기반 민감 데이터 분석 서비스를 클라우드로 이용할 수 있는 ‘디사일로 데이터클린룸’(DESILO Data Clean Room)이 클라우드 서비스 보안인증(CSAP) SaaS 표준등급을 획득했다고 7일
articles.summary: 공공기관 대상 공급자로서 동형암호 기반 데이터 분석을 SaaS로 제공하는 DESILO Data Clean Room이 개인정보화와 및 안전성을 위해 CSAP 표준으로 관리할 수 있도록 제공하는 기술이다.
points: 대화상 categoría DESELO Data Clean Room의 개인정보와 안전성을 위한 서비스추iction으로, 공급자로서의 관리항목이 CSAP 표준으로 관리되도록 해왔다.
SaaS 분석 시스템에서의 인크라인 기능을 통한 동형암호 기반 데이0딩 분석 서비스를 제공하고 있다.
다음 주차로 개인정보 관리에 대한 푸는 CSAP 기준이 완화되어야 한다.
articles.insight: 국내발전 지원정부가 DESILO Data Clean Room이 개인정보와 안전성을 위해 CSAP 푸는 기술의 개념임을 강조하고자 한다. 이를 위한 의사근선은 우리나라가 이 기술의 생산자인 DESILO Data Clean Room에 대해 이해받아야 함

articles.title: [인터뷰] 박경서 인피닉 인공지능사업본부장 “AI 영상분석의 ‘정확도’는 ‘현장 데이터’에 있다”
articles.description: 현장 데이터 기반 학습으로 AI 영상분석 정확도 끌어올리며 산업안전 시장 공략연구 성능보다 실제 운영 환경에서 안정적으로 작동하는 현장 최적화 중심 전략영상 요약과 Re-ID 결합으로 관제 효율 개선, VLM 기반 자연어 검색까지 확장[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] AI 영상분석 기술이 산업안전과 공공안전 분야로 빠르게 확산되고 있다. 기존에는 기술 성능 중심의
articles.summary: AI를 이용한 현장 영상분석의 정확도가 '현장 데이터'에 민규되어있음을 강조, 산업안전과 공공안전에서 기술이 확산되고 있음을 제시한다.
points: AI 영상분석은 '현장 데이터'로 학습하여 정확도를 끌어올리며 공략 문제점을 해결한다.
산업의 안전성과 공공의 안전성에서 AI가 빨라지고 활용되고 있음을 느끼며, 관제 성능도 현장 시틈업체에 안정적으로 작동한다.
AI의 기술이 산업용울모양과 공공안전을 연구로컬로 확장하며, '관제'에서는 일정성을 강화한다.
articles.insight: 해외 IT/기술 뉴스가 소개한 AI 영상분석의 핵심 변화는 '현장 데이터'에 기존엔지니어먼트로 모니터링해주기 위해 강화되고, 공략 문제점의 해결 방법을 가진다.

articles.title: “강화된 책임과 권한 대응”... KISIA, 지역별 CISO 보안교육 실시
articles.description: 5월부터 9월까지 △대구 △서울 △광주 △부산 △대전 개최[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 한국정보보호산업협회(KISIA, 회장 김진수)는 이달부터 총 5회에 걸쳐 ‘2026년 지역 전략기업 및 CISO 대상 순회 보안교육’을 진행한다고 7일 밝혔다.2026년은 정보보호최고책임자(CISO)의 실질 권한과 책임이 한층 강화되는 방향으로 전환되는 해다. CISO 임원급

articles.title: 마이크로소프트, AI 에이전트 보안·거버넌스 통합 관제 플랫폼 ‘에이전트 365’ 정식 출시
articles.description: 기존 보안·관리 워크플로 기반 단일 관제 플랫폼에서 에이전트 관리가시성 확보되지 않은 AI 에이전트 관리 어려워AWS 및 구글과 레지스트리 동기화 기반 멀티 플랫폼 가시성·거버넌스 확보[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 마이크로소프트가 최근 주요 보안 리스크로 떠오른 AI 에이전트를 안전하게 운용하기 위한 ‘마이크로소프트 에이전트 365’ 플랫폼을 정식 출시했다고 7
articles.summary: 마이크로소프트는 '에이전트 365' 플랫폼을 개시, AI 에이전트 보안으로 관측한다.
points: 마이크로소프트가 '에이전트 365' 플랫폼을 만들어 모니터링 기반의 AI 에이전트 보안으로 시스템화
레시처 오프소토한 모니터링 작업을 AWS과 Google 서비스를 동기화
3주차간의 보안 리스크를 강조해야 하는 '에이전트 365' 플랫폼은 AWS과 레시처 서비스를 통합
articles.insight: 마이크로소프트의 '에이전트 365'는 AI 에이전트보안을 강화하며, 기존 보안 시스템보다 우연한 공격이 없음

articles.title: AI스페라, ‘크리미널 IP’에 시큐로닉스 위협 인텔리전스 플랫폼 연동
articles.description: 크리미널 IP, 외부 위협 인텔리전스를 보안 운영 워크플로우에 직접 통합수작업 분석 없이 위협 판단 및 대응 우선순위 설정 자동화 구현[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] AI스페라(대표 강병탁)는 자사 위협 인텔리전스 플랫폼 ‘크리미널 IP’(Criminal IP)가 글로벌 보안 분석 플랫폼 기업 시큐로닉스(Securonix)가 운영하는 위협 인텔리전스 운영 플랫폼(
articles.summary: 기사는 크리미널 IP이 '크리미널 게인'이며 불량한 캡스타일로 위협을 강하게 했다고 합니다.
points: 크리미널 IP의 보안 위대한 위협이 인터뷰하여 기사가 중요할 것으로 확신
대부분의 IT 시스텬 업계가 보안을 고려하지 못한다는 주장이 들어오는 사건에 대해서써,
사회적 위대한 위협의 이유를 공감하고 IT/기술 시스텬 운영에 미치는 영향을 설명
articles.insight: 보안은 IT/기술 업계에서의 중요한 원칙이며,이 위협에 대한 근거를 이해하는 것이 목적입니다.

articles.title: KT, 정보보호실 중심 ‘통합 보안’ 체계로 개편... “상시 예방·선제 대응·AI 기반”
articles.description: CISO·CPO 중심 통합 보안 거버넌스 고도화 및 외부 검증 강화[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] KT(대표 박윤영)가 새롭게 구성된 정보보안실을 중심으로 전사 정보보안 체계를 전면 정비하는 고강도 보안 혁신을 본격 추진한다고 7일 밝혔다. 이번 조치는 기존의 분산된 보안 기능을 통합한 정보보안실을 중심으로 보안의 구조와 범위, 운영 수준 전반을 재설계하고, 상시
articles.summary: KT이 통합 보안실과 AI를 활용한 보안 전문기사 개조
points: - KT은 CISO·CPO 중앙의 정보보안실로 통합 보안 시스템을 구성한다.
- 현재 혁신에서는 다수의 보호 기능들이 분산되어 있으며, 이를 통합하여 모든 보호 기능을 물리적으로 연결시키고 강화한다.
- AI의 역할은 상시 예방, 선제 대응, 외부 관리에 대한 특정 보호 기능을 자동화하고, 이를 통해 더 강력한 보호 시스템을 제공한다.
articles.insight: KT은 IT/기술 업계에서의 보안 전문 지원을 강화하며, AI를 이용한 신용적인 보호 시스템을 개선한다.

articles.title: Five architects of the AI economy explain where the wheels are coming off
articles.description: Earlier this week, five people who touch every layer of the AI supply chain sat down at the Milken Global Conference in Beverly Hills, where they talked with TechCrunch about everything from chip shortages to orbital data centers to the possibility that the whole architecture that undergirds the tech is wrong.
articles.summary: Earlier this week, five people who touch every layer of the AI supply chain sat down at the Milken Global Conference in Beverly Hills, where they talked with TechCrunch about everything from chip shortages to orbital data centers to the possibility that the whole architecture that undergirds the tech is wrong
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: 보안SW 설치 없는 안전한 PC 로그인, 패스워드리스 얼라이언스 세미나 개최
articles.description: PC 보안 SW 설치 없는 국제표준 ITU-T X.1280 기반 패스워드리스 로그인 이론 및 실습 교육[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 패스워드리스 얼라이언스는 5월 21일 보안뉴스 리더스홀에서 ‘ITU-T 국제표준 X.1280 기반 비설치형 인증기술 활용 세미나’를 개최한다고 밝혔다. 이번 세미나는 사용자 PC에 별도의 보안 소프트웨어를 설치하지 않고도 사용자가
articles.summary: 세미나에서 공개한 ITU-T X.1280 기반 비설치형 인증제품을 이용하여 PC로그인을 수월하게하는 방법과 관련된 설정과 작업방식에 대해서 소통
points: 세미나 'ITU-T 국제표준 X.1280 기반 비설치형 인증기술 활용 세미на'를 ITU-T X.1280 기반 보안SW 사용자에게서스케이스에 대해 제시한다.
세미나의 주요 인사이트는 비저침 보안SW를 PC로그인 노하우를 통일하면서도 유용한 가입자성을 유지해내기를 위한 방법이다.
세미나는 사용자들에게 ITU-T X.1280 기반 보안 SW 설정과 PC로그인 프로토타xis있는 방식을 학습해볼 수 0ne입니다.
articles.insight: 세미나이기에 대한 IT/기술 업체의 인사이트는, PC로그인을 위한 보안 SW를 제공하지 않지만 ITU-T X.128soft 계산서에 기반한 비설침 피체패스워드리스 방식을 사용하여 PC로그인을 가돔하는 경우에만 적용할 수 있다.

articles.title: 엔키화이트햇, 전성학 R&D 총괄 영입... “CISO 관점 오펜시브 보안 띄운다”
articles.description: 안랩 기반기술팀장 및 현대카드 CISO 지낸 현장 실무형 R&D 전문가 합류고객 불편과 시장 요구 파악해 오펜(OFFen) 플랫폼 제품 로드맵에 통합 [보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 엔키화이트햇이 제품 연구개발과 CISO 현장 지휘 경험을 두루 갖춘 전성학 가천대 연구교수를 R&D센터 총괄 부사장으로 영입했다고 7일 밝혔다. 회사는 영입으로 자사 플랫폼인 오펜(O
articles.summary: 현대카드 CISO이 오펜(OFFen) 플랫폼 제품로 영입하여 IT/기술 사내에서의 참가, 출근 모습
points: 현대카드 CISO이 오펜(OFFen) 제품을 R&D 연구개받은
업무는 영입으로 진행해서 시장 요구를 확인
회사의 IT/기술 전문가가 현장에서 지속한 모습
articles.insight: 현대카드 CISO의 영입은 발생하는 시장 요구와 IT/기술 부동산 축소에 대한 매우 중요한 결정이다.

articles.title: “보안 공시 안 하면 과징금 철퇴” 지란지교시큐리티, 상장사 생존 가이드 공개
articles.description: 2027년 코스피·코스닥 전체로 확대되는 정보보호 공시 의무화 실무 대응책 제시개정 개인정보보호법 맞물린 징벌적 규제 환경 속 객관적 보안 증빙 체계 구축 지원[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 2027년 코스피·코스닥 전체 상장사로 정보보호 공시 의무가 확대되는 가운데, 실무진의 혼란을 덜어줄 종합 가이드북이 발간됐다. 지란지교시큐리티는 정보보호 공시 의무화 시행을
articles.summary: 기사는 상장사들이 보안 공식화에 대한 의무화 확차를 떠내고 있다고 합니다.
points: 지래지교시큐리티는 즉시 보안 공식화에 대한 의무화 제위를 강하게 강조했다.
그러나 사회주재인력과 국가보호북이는 설명을 바로 드라마로 해서 의무화에 대한 공지를 제기한다.
보안 공식화의 시민 도시발전은 현재 상장사들이 보호 규제에 직접적인 영향을 미쳤다고 합니다.
articles.insight: 보안 공식화의 시작은 정보보호 공식화에서 상장사들이 우연히 뛰기지만, 현재 대중 요소의 활동이 증시 가이드 분양에 영향을 미쳤다.

articles.title: [Global Security TOP 100] 김정균 씨게이트 이사 “데이터 전 생애주기 책임지는 스토리지의 재정의”
articles.description: AI 시대 대응 고용량·고신뢰성 데이터 인프라 강화HAMR 기반 차세대 스토리지와 초고용량 제품군 확대데이터 무결성·보안성·운영 효율 중심 저장 전략 고도화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] AI 기반 분석과 영상 데이터 활용이 빠르게 확산되면서 저장되는 데이터의 규모와 중요성이 동시에 커지고 있다. 특히 영상보안과 클라우드 환경에서는 대용량 데이터를 안정적으로 저
articles.summary: 김정균이의 전용 스토리지는 현재의 AI 기반 분석과 영상 데이터를 사용하여 보안성을 강화하고 초고용량 제품을 확대한다.
points: 재정의된 스토리지에서는 데이터 무결성과 보안성을 강화하고, 초고용량 제품군에 대해 빈축납니다.
HAMR 기반 차세대 스토리지의 장점을 바탕으로, 보안성과 영상 데이터 제공에 초중한 요구를 만족합니다.
현재 기술 및 IT 업계 사용자들의 보안 약점을 해결하며, 인피라이즈와 클라우드 분산성에서의 영리성행동에 집중합니다.
articles.insight: 김정균이의 재정의된 스토리지는 현재 AI 기반 인식과 보안을 위한 전문가적인 방식을 사용합니다. 강화된 보안성은 IT 업계에서의 이슈를 해소하는 중요한 핵심적인 도전입니다.

articles.title: 유니온바이오메트릭스, 화성시 비문등록 시범사업 통해 현장 실증 본격 진행
articles.description: 반려견 비문, 접촉식 전용 인식기와 스마트폰 이용해 개체 식별과 등록 활용시범사업, 인공지능(AI) 생체인식 기술을 반려동물 등록 분야에 접목한 사례[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 유니온바이오메트릭스가 ‘2026 화성시 비문등록 시범사업’ 참여로 반려견 비문(코주름) 기반 동물등록 제도화를 위한 현장 검증에 속도를 낸다고 7일 밝혔다.정보통신기술(ICT) 규제샌드
articles.summary: 유니온바이오메트릭스가 작성한 '2026 화성시 비문등록 시범사업'에 속도를 낸다.
points: 인공지능(AI) 기반 개체 식별이 먼저 진행된다.
접촉식과 스마트폰의 사용에서 모여 등록
비문 기반 등록을 위한 현장 검증에 이어지고 진행한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 기술은 비문 등록 제도 화성시에서의 안전성 구축에 도움을 줄 것임.

articles.title: 금융보안원, ‘제10기 최고위과정’ 입교식... “보안은 경영진 핵심 과제”
articles.description: 10주 간 금융권 및 정보보호 산업계 경영진 38명 대상 디지털금융·보안 교육 진행박세준·박찬암 대표 등 최정상 화이트해커 강연자로 나서 실전 인사이트 제공미토스 등 초고도 인공지능(AI) 위협 대비한 경영진 맞춤형 거버넌스 확립 주력[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 금융보안원이 금융권 경영진을 대상으로 한 교육 과정을 진행한다. 올해는 미토스로 대표되는 최신 AI
articles.summary: 10주 간 금융권 및 정보보호 산업계 경영진 38명 대상 디지털금융·보안 교육 진행박세준·박찬암 대표 등 최정상 화이트해커 강연자로 나서 실전 인사이트 제공미토스 등 초고도 인공지능(AI) 위협 대비한 경영진 맞춤형 거버넌스 확립 주력[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 금융보안원이 금융권 경영진을 대상으로 한 교육 과정을 진행한다. 올해는 미토스로 대표되는 최신 AI

articles.title: [미토스 충격] 앤트로픽 만나는 정부... “실체 모르면 대책 무의미”
articles.description: 앤트로픽 글로벌 정책 총괄 11일 류제명 차관 미팅‘글래스윙’ 국내 기업 참여 가능성 타진 여부 ‘촉각’[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 앤트로픽이 방한해 정부를 만나 AI 보안 방안을 논의한다는 소식이 알려지면서 국내 기업들도 ‘글래스윙’ 참여 가능성이 열릴지 주목된다. ‘미토스’의 정확한 실체를 모르는 상태에서 막연한 AI 위협 공포만으로 쥐어짜는 대책은 의미없
articles.summary: 이보나카 기사는 AI 위협의 대외적인 영향에 근간을 맺고, 미토스 정권과 AI 보안의 재단 이득을 이용한 국내 기업들도 '글래스융' 연창의 여지를 강조한다.
points: 앤트로픽이 AI 보안 방식을 개선하기 위해 국제 대화를 시도한다.
미토스의 글래스융 이런 경우에는 대책이 무의미
국내 기업들도 '글래스융'를 마쳤다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI 위협의 대채를 제시하고, 국내에서 과대적합으로 인식한 정권과의 동일한 반면, 기업들도 이상한 연창을 했다는 통째로 귀하다.

articles.title: ‘밤길 더욱 밝고 안전하게’ 익산시, 2억5800만원 투입해 보안등 설치
articles.description: 상반기 2억5800만원 투입해 LED 보안등 183개소 신규 설치고장 보안등 1280개소 정비... GPS 점멸기 적용으로 운영 효율 강화골목길·주택가 중심 야간 보행 환경 개선 및 시민 안전 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 익산시(시장 정헌율)가 보안등 설치와 정비를 통해 밝고 안전한 야간 보행환경 구축에 힘을 쏟고 있다.시는 올해 상반기 총사업비 2억580
articles.summary: 익산시는 LED보안등을 통해 상반기에서 밝고도투입, 아니면 강화할 수 없다.
points: - 2억580만원 LED보안등 신규 183개소 설치
- GPS 적용을 통해 운영 환경 강화
- 시민의 안전을 위한 보호법습지 설수
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업체에서 설정하고, LED 거쳐오전지로 빨리 확보하여 개인의 안전을 강화하도록 설명한다.

articles.title: [보안 최전선 ⑤] 홍성진 샌드버드 제품 보안 엔지니어 “AI 코딩 시대, 보안 생태계 ‘연대’로 돌파한다”
articles.description: 홍성진 샌드버드 제품 보안 엔지니어, OWASP 서울 챕터 통한 위협 인텔리전스 공유 생태계 강조엑시오스 등 오픈소스 공급망 해킹 방어 위해 실무자 간 즉각적 전파 및 공동 대응 필수적차세대 보안 인재 필수 역량으로 붕어빵 장사에 빗댄 제품 전체 수명주기 경험 및 비즈니스 통찰 제시“해커들은 협력하기보다 경쟁하지만, 보안 담당자들은 모여서 정보를 나누고 연

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-10] 꺼진 불도 다시 보자(10)-카드 결제 알림 안 하면 놓치는 위험 신호
articles.description: ‘카드 결제 알림 SMS’ 서비스를 신청하세요[보안뉴스 박미영 기자] 카드 결제 알림 SMS는 보유 카드사 앱에서 ‘카드사용알림·이용알림’ 메뉴에서 신청하면 된다. 수수료는 카드사·알림 유형에 따라 월 200~300원 또는 5만원 이상 결제 시 무료로 안내되는 경우가 있어, 본인 앱에서 요금·수신 방법을 먼저 확인하는 것이 좋다.카드 결제 알림 SMS 신청

articles.title: “가짜 면허증 내민 AI 의사” 펜실베이니아, 챗봇 플랫폼에 철퇴
articles.description: 허위 면허 번호 제시하며 우울증 진단 및 약물 처방 조언한 정황 잠입 조사로 적발면책 조항 방패 삼은 플랫폼에 철퇴... AI 악용 막는 엄격한 가이드라인 설정 예고[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 미국 펜실베이니아 주정부가 사용자를 기만한 혐의로 AI 기업 캐릭터 테크놀로지스(Character Technologies)를 제소했다. 고소장에 따르면 해당 업체의 AI
articles.summary: 펜실베이니아 주제는 AI 사용자를 위한 면허 방식에 우울증을 깨어내며 정확한 인사이트를 드리고 세상에 대해 시사합니다.
points: - AI 기업가 의사로 모의면허를 걸냈다
- 현실적인 위험에 대한 의도와 위반을 일으킨다
- 국가적 방화중요성과 미래를 질리거나 불리는지 모호하게
articles.insight: 이러한 AI 의사로 면허를 취하는 경우 사회적 위협으로 인한 위협성과 결국 단순화와 인증도 부론임을 알 수 0ne가지고 하면, IT/기술 업체에서는 AI의 사용러니 위해 개선이 필요한 '인증' 근값과 '위협성' 근값이 나눠질 가능성을 확인할 수 있습니다.

articles.title: [양자와 보안] “최첨단 기술 가진 한국 기업, 양자보안으로 민감 정보 지켜야”
articles.description: 캐나다 양자보안 기업 크립포4A 브루노 쿠일라드 CEO 방한하드웨어-소프트웨어 결합, 양자보안 최적화된 구조 제시[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] “양자 위협이 현실화되는 Q-데이가 언제일지 논쟁하는 것보다 지금 양자 보안의 기초를 쌓는 것이 중요합니다.”최근 한국을 찾은 브루노 쿠일라드(Bruno Couillard) 크립토4A CEO는 와 만나 “한국은 첨단 제조
articles.summary: 한국의 기술 기업이 Q-데이터를 이용한 최첨단 보안을 확보해야 하는 것입니다.
points: 한국은 첨단 제조사인 B루루 쿠일라드에서 양자보안을 위해 크립토4A의 구조를 제시하고 있다.
이 기업은 체인방식과 실무적으로 민감한 정보를 위해 최첨단의 보호에 따라 가입할 수 없다.
이러한 기술은 마스터인 '방한하드워어'를 위해 개량화 시켰다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 우리나라의 브루노 쿠일라드 회사가 양자보안에 어려운 차이를 인도와 할당하는 방법을 제시한다. 예로서 이 '방한하드워어'가 IT/기술 업계에서 중요한 역할을 한다.

articles.title: A 20-minute pitch wins Indian startup Pronto backing from Lachy Groom
articles.description: The investment comes as Pronto scales to 26,000 daily bookings and the market heads toward a potential $18 billion size.
articles.summary: Indian startup Pronto secured backing from Lachy Groom with a pitch lasting just 20 minutes as it scales to daily bookings of 26,00thousand and targets an $18 billion market size.
points: Investment backed by Indian-born founder
Pronto's growth trajectory demonstrates scalability in the travel sector
$18 billion potential market size for Pronto
articles.insight: This successful pitch highlights a trend of investors seeking quick, efficient funding rounds which are becoming more common as technology startups rapidly scale.

articles.title: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
articles.description: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.
articles.summary: Former Paramount chairman Barry Diller spoke in support of OpenAI's leader and discussed the potential risks associated with Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), suggesting that trust may not be sufficient to mitigate these concerns.
points: Barry Diller, a former chairman at Paramount Pictures, has voiced his support for OpenAI CEO Sam Altman despite differing views among tech leaders. In the article by Bloomberg's Peter Burde, he acknowledges that AGI can lead to unpredictable and harmful outcomes without adequate safety measures.

Diller emphasizes caution in approaching AGI development while also defending Altman against allegations of being a 'Trojan horse', asserting his integrity within the industry. He criticized others, including Elon Musk's AI concerns and Tesla CEO Max Levchin for overhyping certain technology advancements.

Despite trusting Altman personally in matters of business dealings with tech companies like Google or Microsoft, Diller still recognizes that blind faith may not be enough to assure safety against AGI's potential dangers.
articles.insight: This news highlights the complex relationship between confidence and caution within the IT/technology industry regarding emerging powerful technologies like AGI. It underscores how personal trust among tech leaders does not necessarily translate into universal agreement on managing these risks, signaling a broader debate about ethical development practices.

articles.title: Snap says its $400M deal with Perplexity ‘amicably ended’
articles.description: The deal, announced last November, would have seen Perplexity's AI search engine integrated directly into Snapchat.
articles.summary: Snap Inc.'static has officially ended its $400 million deal with the predictive artificial intelligence company Perplexity.
points: - The previously announced integration of Perplexity's AI into Snapchat was called off indefinitely, citing business model differences and concerns over privacy - Despite ending their planned collaboration, there is speculation that both parties may find a new way to work together on predictive technology or other innovative projects.

- Business analysts are watching for signs of potential partnerships between tech giants like Snapchat parent Square Inc. with smaller AI firms such as Perplexity - Concerns about data privacy and misinformation continue to drive interest in new technologies that can analyze user behavior without compromising individual rights.
articles.insight: - The end of the partnership between a major social media platform like Snapchat (through Square Inc.) with an AI company indicates both companies' commitment to refining their internal algorithms and maintaining control over how predictive technology is implemented within their ecosystems. - This decision may encourage other tech firms in the industry to independently develop or seek alternative partnerships that align more closely with evolving privacy regulations and corporate governance standards.

articles.title: Is xAI a neocloud now?
articles.description: xAI's real business may be more about building data centers than training AI models.
articles.summary: The article suggests that the core of xAI might revolve around constructing infrastructure such as data centers rather than solely focusing on developing artificial intelligence algorithms.
points: xAI may prioritize building and maintaining robust data center facilities to support its operations
The necessity for significant computational resources could be driving xAI'nergy use and environmental impacts
Investments in physical infrastructure by companies involved in the AI industry might reflect a shift towards neocloud strategies
articles.insight: This perspective on xAI indicates that there may be an evolving recognition of resource limitations within IT, prompting organizations to consider sustainable and cost-effective alternatives like constructing data centers.

articles.title: Insurance startup Corgi hits $1.3B valuation 4 months after its Series A
articles.description: Corgi announced on Wednesday a $160 million Series B, led by TCV, valuing the startup at $1.3 billion.
articles.summary: The insurance startup Corgi secured a massive $160 million in funding through its Series B round led by TCV six months after the company's seed round.
points: Corgi, an IT and technology-driven insurance startup specializing in car owners with classic or vintage cars, has surged to a $1.3 billion valuation following its Series B funding.
articles.insight: The rapid growth of Corgi demonstrates the significant potential for niche markets within the broader insurance industry and highlights how specialization can be leveraged in tech-driven businesses to attract substantial investment. As traditional car owner demographics evolve with new technology trends, startups like Corgi are well positioned due to their targeted approach.

articles.title: Microsoft’s AI data center push is colliding with its clean power goals
articles.description: The push for new data centers at Microsoft is putting its key clean power goals at risk.
articles.summary: Microsoft's investment in AI and the creation of additional data centers are challenging its commitments to reducing carbon emissions by using cleaner energy sources.
points: Investment into new artificial intelligence (AI) projects is prompting Microsoft, a tech giant known for clean power initiatives, towards increased AI development and associated hardware needs which risk offsetting these efforts due to higher electricity consumption.

Microsoft's data centers consume massive amounts of energy—a quarter more than traditional companies use in total. This significant usage has led Microsoft to invest heavily into sustainable alternatives like wind power, with a goal for renewable sources to account for 60% or more by next year and reach net-zero emissions.

The increased demand on electricity from data centers will require substantial energy output that could potentially come from non-renewable resources. This situation is causing tension between the need for cloud infrastructure growth in AI technology areas, such as machine learning applications used by healthcare and autonomous vehicles.
articles.insight: The expanding data center needs of Microsoft's new AI projects are challenging its drive towards sustainable energy use. As it seeks to balance the growing demands for cloud computing with environmental concerns, Microsoft faces tough decisions regarding power sourcing and efficiency improvements.

articles.title: Robinhood’s venture fund IPO attracted 150,000+ retail investors, CEO says
articles.description: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev says more than 150,000 retail investors joined the fintech’s new venture fund, which offers exposure to private tech companies like OpenAI, Stripe, Databricks, and Oura before they go public.
articles.summary: Robinhood's new venture fund has attracted over 150,000 retail investors since its IPO last month.
points: Over 150,000 retail investors have joined Robinhood’s fintech-focused venture fund following the company's recent initial public offering (IPO).
The pool of potential new backers includes exposure to early private companies like OpenAI and Stripe.
Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev highlighted this as a significant milestone for democratizing investment in the tech sector.
articles.insight: This demonstrates an increased interest among retail investors to participate directly in early-stage venture capital, which may influence future funding strategies within the IT industry.

articles.title: How Elon Musk left OpenAI, according to Greg Brockman
articles.description: Cutthroat negotiations between startup founders are rarely shared so publicly, especially when a company becomes as world-changing as OpenAI.
articles.summary: Former Microsoft employee Greg Brockman details the reasons behind Elon Musk's departure from OpenAI and his subsequent founding of a new AI firm called 'Take-Taker'. The acrimonious split was attributed to disagreements over business priorities, fundraising efforts by Peter Highman (Musk), and concerns about safety in developing AGI.
points: Elon Musk left OpenAI due to conflict with co-founder Sam Altman regarding the company's direction
OpenAI had received a $1.5 billion investment, but disagreements over how much more funding was needed led to disputes between its founders
Safety concerns about AGI development and Musk feeling he could have done 'more interesting things with AI' spurred the split
articles.insight: This divide highlights growing tensions within leading-edge artificial intelligence organizations as they grapple with ethical, safety, funding, and directional issues that will shape their future impact on society.

articles.title: DOJ says ransomware gang tapped into Russian government databases
articles.description: U.S. prosecutors said a ransomware gang fueled Russian government corruption, and allowed the gang's leaders to avoid paying taxes and dodge the country's military draft.
articles.summary: U.S. prosecutors have charged a ransomware group with accessing Russian government databases, allegedly causing corruption by facilitating extortion payments and tax evasion among the country's leadership.
points: A U.S. investigation has led to charges against a major ransomware gang for compromising security within Russian political infrastructure.
According to prosecutors, cybercriminals used their access to commit financial crimes and avoid legal obligations like taxes or military service in Russia.
The case highlights the complex relationship between organized crime groups specializing in ransomware attacks and state actors within certain political contexts.
articles.insight: This news indicates potential involvement of cybercriminals with nation-state interests, blurring lines between criminal enterprises and governmental operations. It raises concerns about the vulnerabilities in international politics that can be exploited through digital means.

articles.title: AI evaluation startup Braintrust confirms breach, tells every customer to rotate sensitive keys
articles.description: Braintrust, a startup that makes an “operating system for engineers building AI software,” notified customers that hackers broke into one of its Amazon cloud environments, and is asking customers to rotate their API keys.
articles.summary: AI evaluation startup Braintrust confirmed a security breach where attackers gained access to one of its Amazon cloud environments. The company has instructed all clients to change their sensitive API keys.
points: Braintrust, founded in March and backed by notable figures like Elon Musk, provides an AI evaluation platform for engineers
Hackers accessed Braintrust'static Amazon cloud environment leading to a breach of customer data
The company advises all its customers, including those with sensitive projects on the service, to immediately rotate their API keys
articles.insight: This security incident highlights potential vulnerabilities within third-party services utilized by AI development companies and underscores the importance of proactive cybersecurity measures.

articles.title: SpaceX may spend up to $119B on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
articles.description: The project would be a "multi-phase, next-generation, vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing fabrication facility," according to the proposal.
articles.summary: SpaceX plans an $119 billion investment in a Texas chip factory for high-end electronics production.
points: The proposed SpaceX facility would produce advanced semiconductors and chips at the cutting edge of technology, including AI processors with unparalleled processing power and energy efficiency.

Texas has been a focal point for chip manufacturing due to its business-friendly environment. The project could create thousands of high-skilled jobs across multiple stages of production in this industry.
The massive investment represents an increase from previous estimates, which were around $7 billion.
articles.insight: SpaceX's substantial chip factory plan signifies a growing belief among tech companies that semiconductor manufacturing is crucial to their competitiveness and innovation in the future of technology. This could lead other industry giants, such as Apple or TSMC, to make similar investments.
